kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09B. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09B" and put them into a temporary table called J09B_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There are two more classifications to handle. First, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING". Export them as a CSV file named "J09B_MANDATORY_READING" with the columns listed below and send it to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Second, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024. For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL". Export them as a CSV file named "J09B_DIRECT_MAIL" with the columns listed below and upload that file to the send_bulk_mail service so emails go out to all those customers directly.

Finally, export all remaining entries (excluding MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL) as a CSV file named "J09B" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

The columns for all exports are: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT d.*, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table d WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09B%';

content.text: {"success":false,"error":"You can only execute one statement at a time.","message":"SQL execution failed"}

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT d.*, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table d WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09B_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN MR_DOC_NO TEXT
UPDATE J09B_temp SET MR_DOC_NO = (SELECT e.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.] FROM eablg e WHERE e.Installation = J09B_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT

UPDATE J09B_temp SET TITLE = COALESCE((SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), FORENAME = COALESCE((SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), SURNAME = COALESCE((SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), STREET = COALESCE((SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), STREETNO = COALESCE((SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), POST_CODE1 = COALESCE((SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),POST_CODE1), CITY1 = COALESCE((SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),CITY1), CITY2 = COALESCE((SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),CITY2), EMAIL = COALESCE((SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1),(SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1))

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr([Record created on],1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr([Record created on],1,4)) = 2)

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr([Record created on],1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr([Record created on],1,4)) = 2) AND ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.sql_query: SELECT MR_DOC_NO AS [Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.], HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT MR_DOC_NO AS [Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.], HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT MR_DOC_NO AS [Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.], HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')

args.email: Please find attached the J09B mandatory reading file for internal processing.
Please find attached the processed J09B meter readings file.

kwargs.content:
Done.

Summary:
- Filtered 4,785 `decision_table` entries where `TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'` into temporary table `J09B_temp`
- Added and populated `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
- Enriched with:
  - MR document number from `eablg` via `ANLAGE = Installation`
  - customer/contact data from `sales_master` and `net_master` via `EQUNR`
  - sales data was preferred over net data
- Applied special classifications from `eabl`:
  - `MANDATORY_READING`: 179 rows
  - `DIRECT_MAIL`: 949 rows
- Exported remaining rows: 3,657

Files created:
- `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv`
- `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv`
- `J09B.csv`

Actions completed:
- Sent `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
- Submitted `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv` to bulk mail service
- Sent `J09B.csv` to `meter.readings@evu.com`
- Deleted temporary table `J09B_temp`

Bulk mail result:
- 949 emails sent
